r|q"|	d	v
q"|	}
\.(\w+)\s*=\s*(\w+),?
name)
NULLz
^([a-z]+)(.*?)$z
\1z2%s:%d Bad prefix '%s' for API '%s', expecting '%s')
fileTz
^[a-z]+
z	^([A-Z]+)c
group
lower
 scripts_pkg/check-driverimpls.py
<lambda>A
z"checkdriverimpls.<locals>.<lambda>Z
nwfZ
^([a-z])c
upperr
z5%s:%d Bad impl name '%s' for API '%s', expecting '%s'z,^(?:static\s+)?(vir(?:\w+)?Driver)\s+(?!.*;))
virNWFilterCallbackDriverZ

virConnectDriver)	
open
searchr
print
stderr
startswith)

intableZ

liner

want
drvr
